lint.note: Fixed 1 QF1003 issue: converted if-else chain to tagged switch in internal/store/etext.go:433

featureReviews.summary: Complete window manager with launcher, lifecycle management, and server-backed persistence. All 110 Playwright tests pass.
E-text backend foundations with Document/Revision types, SQLite persistence, LCS-based diff, revision-chain blame, and auth-gated APIs. 37 test cases pass.
Comprehensive e-text UI with document creation, direct edits, history, diff/blame views, and citation persistence. 9 Playwright tests pass.
Agent revision flow with canonical appagent attribution, live progress events, and idempotent mutation tracking. 17 backend tests pass.
13 Playwright tests for agent revision browser flow covering prompt submission, progress updates, attribution, and non-duplication. All 132 total Playwright tests pass.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Documentation mentions 'Dolt-backed' but uses SQLite. Migration-ready design exists but comment should clarify current state.
LCS diff uses full DP table (O(m*n) space). Memory consideration for very large documents.
Blame algorithm noted as 'approximate but sufficient' in comments. Could be more precise with proper line-range mapping.

appliedUpdates.description: Fixed staticcheck QF1003: converted if-else chain to tagged switch in internal/store/etext.go:433

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Multiple workers created feature-specific library documentation (.factory/library/desktop-shell.md, etext-authoring-ui.md, etext-agent-revision.md). Consider standardizing this pattern in AGENTS.md as an encouraged practice for complex features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features desktop-shell-window-manager, etext-authoring-and-history-ui, and etext-appagent-revision-and-attribution all created library documentation files.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider documenting the data-attribute test selector convention as a formal project convention. All e-text and desktop features consistently use data-* attributes for Playwright test targeting.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: ETextEditor.svelte has 15 data attributes; Desktop.svelte, Window.svelte use data-desktop-*; etext-agent-revision.spec.js uses data-etext-agent-* selectors.

rejectedObservations.reason: File exists at .factory/services.yaml. Reviewers may have looked in wrong location.
